title: LegenVD
description: Magic the Gathering strategy videos with a focus on the digital Magic Arena.This channel is supported by its fans on Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

videos.title: How to copy your Hydras.
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena deck tech & gameplay with a +1/+1 counter Hydra deck, ft. Druneth, Reviver of the Hive (Jackal, Genius Geneticist) as commander in Brawl.

Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/LegenVD

00:00 - Intro
02:45 - Deck Tech
09:04 - vs Runo, Stromkirk
15:11 - vs Ugin, Eye of the Storms
22:34 - vs Obosh, the Preypiercer
31:50 - vs Sephiroth, Fabled SOLDIER
37:15 - vs Marina Vendrell
41:41 - vs Muldrotha, the Gravetide
48:06 - vs Saheeli, Sublime Artificer
49:04 - vs Kotis, the Fangkeeper

Decklist: 
https://aetherhub.com/Deck/druneth-reviver-of-the-hive-brawl
